templates.template: Pure Storage FlashArray v1 by HTTP
templates.name: Pure Storage FlashArray v1 by HTTP
templates.description:
Setup:
1. Create a host for the Pure Storage FlashArray device and assign to it the "Pure Storage FlashArray v1 by HTTP" template.
2. Enter your API token from the Purity//FA web interface into the {$PURE.FLASHARRAY.API.TOKEN} macro.
3. Set your Purity//FA web interface URL as the {$PURE.FLASHARRAY.API.URL} macro value.

You can discuss this template or leave feedback on our forum https://www.zabbix.com/forum/zabbix-suggestions-and-feedback.

Generated by official Zabbix template tool "Templator"
templates.readme:
## Setup

1. Create a host for the Pure Storage FlashArray device and assign to it the "Pure Storage FlashArray v1 by HTTP" template.
2. Enter your API token from the FlashArray (Purity//FA) graphical user interface into the `API token` host wizard configuration field.
3. It is possible to authenticate using username and password by entering them from the FlashArray (Purity//FA) graphical user interface into the `Username` and `Password` host wizard configuration fields.
4. Set your FlashArray (Purity//FA) graphical user interface URL as the `Web interface URL` host wizard configuration field value.

items.name: Array capacity
items.description: Total capacity of the array.

items.name: Array data reduction
items.description: The data reduction ratio (DRR) represents the efficiency of data reduction techniques such as compression and deduplication for the array volume.

items.name: Storage array item errors
items.description: Collects errors from array data retrieval.

triggers.name: Pure Storage FlashArray: There are errors in the 'Get storage array data' metric
triggers.description: An error occurred when trying to get array data from the Pure Storage FlashArray API.

items.name: Get array data
items.description: Collects array data from the Pure Storage FlashArray API.

items.name: Array hostname
items.description: Host name of the array.

items.name: Array parity
items.description: The percentage of data that is protected.

items.name: Array bytes read per second
items.description: Number of bytes read per second.

items.name: Array read requests per second
items.description: Number of read requests processed per second.

items.name: Array shared space
items.description: The physical space occupied by deduplicated data.

items.name: Array snapshots size
items.description: The physical space occupied by snapshots.

items.name: Array system size
items.description: The physical space occupied by internal array metadata.

items.name: Array thin provisioning
items.description: The percentage of volume sectors that do not contain host-written data because the hosts have not written data to them or the sectors have been explicitly trimmed.

items.name: Array total data reduction
items.description: The total reduction ratio of all data on the array volume that has been processed by the data deduplication and compression engines.

items.name: Array microseconds per operation
items.description: Average local queue time in microseconds for both read and write operations.

items.name: Array microseconds per read
items.description: Average time in microseconds required to process an I/O read request from the array. The average time does not include SAN time, queue time, or QoS rate limit time.

items.name: Array microseconds per write
items.description: Average time in microseconds required to process an I/O write request to the array. The average time does not include SAN time, queue time, or QoS rate limit time.

items.name: Array used space
items.description: The total physical space occupied by system, shared space, volume, and snapshot data.

items.name: Array version
items.description: Version of the array.

items.name: Array volumes size
items.description: The physical space occupied by volumes.

items.name: Array write requests per second
items.description: Number of write requests processed per second.

items.name: Array bytes written per second
items.description: Number of bytes written per second.

items.name: Authentication
items.description:
Pure Storage FlashArray authentication with username and password or API token usage.
Returns a session ID that is required only once and is used for all dependent script items.
A session will expire after 30 minutes. Check the template documentation for details.

items.name: Authentication item errors
items.description: Collects errors from the authentication item.

triggers.name: Pure Storage FlashArray: Authentication has failed
triggers.description: An error occurred when trying to perform authentication in the Pure Storage FlashArray API.

items.name: Certificates item errors
items.description: Collects errors from certificate retrieval.

triggers.name: Pure Storage FlashArray: There are errors in the 'Get certificates' metric
triggers.description: An error occurred when trying to get certificate data from the Pure Storage FlashArray API.

items.name: Get certificates
items.description: Collects all certificates from the Pure Storage FlashArray API.

items.name: Storage hardware item errors
items.description: Collects errors from hardware retrieval.

triggers.description: An error occurred when trying to get hardware data from the Pure Storage FlashArray API.

items.name: Get hardware data
items.description: Collects hardware from the Pure Storage FlashArray API.

items.description: Collects all hosts from the Pure Storage FlashArray API.

items.name: Phone home status
items.description: Current status of a manually-initiated phonehome.

triggers.description: Phone Home connects to the Pure1 service and uploads logs for continuous health monitoring.

items.description: Status of the remote assist connection.

triggers.name: Pure Storage FlashArray: RemoteAssist has been enabled
triggers.description: Purity's administrator-controlled RemoteAssist feature enables a Technical Support Engineer to communicate directly with the FlashArray via a secure link, effectively establishing an additional administrative session for the duration of the diagnosis and service.

items.description: Collects errors from volume retrieval.

discovery_rules.name: Certificate discovery
discovery_rules.description: Discovery of certificates from the Pure Storage FlashArray API.

item_prototypes.name: Certificate [{#NAME}]: Common name
item_prototypes.description: The common name field listed in the {#NAME} certificate.

item_prototypes.name: Certificate [{#NAME}]: Get data
item_prototypes.description: Collects data about the {#NAME} certificate.

item_prototypes.name: Certificate [{#NAME}]: Issued by
item_prototypes.description: Indicates the authority or organization that issued the {#NAME} certificate, typically including information such as the name of the Certificate Authority (CA) and its digital signature.

item_prototypes.name: Certificate [{#NAME}]: Issued to
item_prototypes.description: Indicates the entity which holds the {#NAME} certificate.

item_prototypes.name: Certificate [{#NAME}]: Valid from
item_prototypes.description: Indicates the date and time when the {#NAME} certificate takes effect.

item_prototypes.name: Certificate [{#NAME}]: Valid to
item_prototypes.description: Indicates the expiration date and time of the {#NAME} certificate.

trigger_prototypes.expression: last(/Pure Storage FlashArray v1 by HTTP/purestorage.flasharray.cert.valid_to[{#NAME}]) > 0 and (last(/Pure Storage FlashArray v1 by HTTP/purestorage.flasharray.cert.valid_to[{#NAME}]) - now()) / 86400 < {$PURE.FLASHARRAY.CERT.EXPIRY.WARN}
trigger_prototypes.name: Pure Storage FlashArray: Certificate [{#NAME}]: SSL certificate expires soon
trigger_prototypes.event_name: Pure Storage FlashArray: Certificate [{#NAME}]: SSL certificate expires soon (less than {$PURE.FLASHARRAY.CERT.EXPIRY.WARN} days)
trigger_prototypes.description: Consider reissuing and replacing the {#NAME} certificate.

discovery_rules.name: Controller discovery
discovery_rules.description: Discovery of controllers from the Pure Storage FlashArray API.

item_prototypes.name: Controller [{#NAME}]: Get data
item_prototypes.description: Collects data about the {#NAME} controller.

item_prototypes.name: Controller [{#NAME}]: Model
item_prototypes.description: Model of the {#NAME} controller.

item_prototypes.name: Controller [{#NAME}]: Mode
item_prototypes.description: The current mode of the {#NAME} controller.

trigger_prototypes.expression: last(/Pure Storage FlashArray v1 by HTTP/purestorage.flasharray.ctrl.mode[{#NAME}],#1)<>last(/Pure Storage FlashArray v1 by HTTP/purestorage.flasharray.ctrl.mode[{#NAME}],#2)
trigger_prototypes.name: Pure Storage FlashArray: Controller [{#NAME}]: Mode has been changed
trigger_prototypes.description: The mode of the {#NAME} controller has changed.

item_prototypes.name: Controller [{#NAME}]: Serial number
item_prototypes.description: Serial number of the {#NAME} controller.

item_prototypes.name: Controller [{#NAME}]: Status
item_prototypes.description: The current status of the {#NAME} controller.

trigger_prototypes.expression: last(/Pure Storage FlashArray v1 by HTTP/purestorage.flasharray.ctrl.status[{#NAME}])<>1 and last(/Pure Storage FlashArray v1 by HTTP/purestorage.flasharray.ctrl.status[{#NAME}])<>2
trigger_prototypes.name: Pure Storage FlashArray: Controller [{#NAME}]: Controller is not ready

item_prototypes.name: Controller [{#NAME}]: Version
item_prototypes.description: Version of the {#NAME} controller.

discovery_rules.description: Discovery of storage drives from the Pure Storage FlashArray API.

item_prototypes.name: Drive [{#NAME}]: Capacity
item_prototypes.description: The capacity of the {#NAME} drive.

item_prototypes.name: Drive [{#NAME}]: Get data
item_prototypes.description: Collects data about the {#NAME} drive.

item_prototypes.name: Drive [{#NAME}]: Serial number
item_prototypes.description: Serial number of the {#NAME} drive device.

item_prototypes.name: Drive [{#NAME}]: Status
item_prototypes.description: The current status of the {#NAME} drive.

trigger_prototypes.expression: last(/Pure Storage FlashArray v1 by HTTP/purestorage.flasharray.drive.status[{#NAME}])<>0 and last(/Pure Storage FlashArray v1 by HTTP/purestorage.flasharray.drive.status[{#NAME}])<>2 and last(/Pure Storage FlashArray v1 by HTTP/purestorage.flasharray.drive.status[{#NAME}])<>3
trigger_prototypes.name: Pure Storage FlashArray: Drive [{#NAME}]: Problem on the drive
trigger_prototypes.event_name: Pure Storage FlashArray: Drive [{#NAME}]: Drive is not healthy or is not ready for use

item_prototypes.description: The data reduction ratio (DRR) represents the efficiency of data reduction techniques such as compression and deduplication for the {#NAME} host volume.

item_prototypes.description: Collects data about the {#NAME} host.

item_prototypes.description: The physical space occupied by snapshots on the {#NAME} host volume.

item_prototypes.name: Host [{#NAME}]: Thin provisioning

item_prototypes.name: Host [{#NAME}]: Total data reduction
item_prototypes.description: The total reduction ratio of all data on the {#NAME} host volume that has been processed by the data deduplication and compression engines.

item_prototypes.name: Host [{#NAME}]: Write requests per second
item_prototypes.description: Number of write requests processed on the {#NAME} host volume per second.

item_prototypes.name: Host [{#NAME}]: Bytes written per second
item_prototypes.description: Number of bytes written to the {#NAME} host volume per second.

discovery_rules.name: Network interface discovery
discovery_rules.description: Discovery of storage hosts from the Pure Storage FlashArray API.

item_prototypes.name: Interface [{#IFNAME}]: Gateway
item_prototypes.description: Represents the IP address of the gateway for the {#IFNAME} interface.

item_prototypes.name: Interface [{#IFNAME}]: Get data
item_prototypes.description: Collects data about the {#IFNAME} network interface.

item_prototypes.name: Interface [{#IFNAME}]: IP address
item_prototypes.description: Represents the IP address of the {#IFNAME} interface.

item_prototypes.name: Interface [{#IFNAME}]: MAC address
item_prototypes.description: Represents the MAC address of the {#IFNAME} interface.

item_prototypes.name: Interface [{#IFNAME}]: Speed
item_prototypes.description: Current bandwidth of the interface.

trigger_prototypes.expression: change(/Pure Storage FlashArray v1 by HTTP/purestorage.flasharray.net_if.speed[{#IFNAME}])<0 and last(/Pure Storage FlashArray v1 by HTTP/purestorage.flasharray.net_if.speed[{#IFNAME}])>0
trigger_prototypes.recovery_expression: (change(/Pure Storage FlashArray v1 by HTTP/purestorage.flasharray.net_if.speed[{#IFNAME}])>0 and last(/Pure Storage FlashArray v1 by HTTP/purestorage.flasharray.net_if.speed[{#IFNAME}],#2)>0)
trigger_prototypes.name: Pure Storage FlashArray: Interface [{#IFNAME}]: Ethernet has changed to lower speed than it was before
trigger_prototypes.description: This Ethernet connection has transitioned down from its known maximum speed. This might be a sign of autonegotiation issues. Acknowledge to close the problem manually.
